text:
Photo:Al Bello / Getty Images Sport / Getty Images

Hollywood daredevil Tom Cruise will close out the Paris Olympics by passing the official Olympic flag From Paris to Los Angeles for the 2028 Games.

During the Closing Ceremony, Cruise will rappel down from the top of Stade de France then fly with the flag to Los Angeles where he skydives down to the Hollywood sign.

TMZ claims "Cruise came up with the idea and shared it with the International Olympic Committee."

Cruise has been in Paris for the summer games from the opening ceremony along the River Seine on July 26 to the Closing Ceremony.
title: Tom Cruise To Close Out Olympics with Epic Stunt | NewsRadio WIOD | Florida News
description: Hollywood daredevil Tom Cruise will close out the Paris Olympics by passing the official Olympic flag From Paris to Los Angeles for the 2028 Games.
keywords: Tom Cruise, Los Angeles, Paris Olympics, Olympic, Closing Ceremony, Paris
